title: choretrum glomeratum
intro: Choretrum glomeratum, also known as cluster Choretrum, is a small shrub native to Tasmania in Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indigenous Australian medicine, where it is used to treat a range of ailments. The plant is said to have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the treatment of skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. Choretrum glomeratum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or poultice, and is also used in various traditional remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
